content.text:
```mdl
@ Non‑Disclosure Agreement – PJM (2015) – Module for cross‑module alignment
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_13_nda_10

open std.collections

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Types
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Parties to the Agreement
type Party = {
    name:                 string,
    is_transmission_owner: bool,
    -- True if the Party has ever disclosed that the Agreement exists or was negotiated
    has_disclosed_agreement: bool
}

@ Certificate signed by a Reviewing Representative
type NonDisclosureCertificate = {
    signed_by: Party,
    date:      string
}

@ A person who may access Confidential Information
type ReviewingRepresentative = {
    person_name:                     string,
    party:                           Party,
    -- True when the Representative has executed a Non‑Disclosure Certificate
    has_executed_certificate:        bool,
    -- True when the Representative has duties that are “Competitive Duties”
    has_competitive_duties:          bool,
    -- True while the Representative is employed/engaged by the Party
    is_employed:                     bool,
    -- True if the Representative has used Confidential Information to give a
    -- competitive or commercial advantage to any Party
    used_confidential_for_competitive_advantage: bool,
    -- True while the Representative still has access to Confidential Information
    has_access:                      bool
}

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Entities (public model objects)
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ The Party that provides Confidential Information
entity disclosing_party: Party

@ The Party that receives Confidential Information
entity receiving_party: Party

@ A Representative of a Party who may view Confidential Information
entity reviewing_rep: ReviewingRepresentative

@ The signed Non‑Disclosure Certificate attached to a Representative
entity nd_certificate: NonDisclosureCertificate

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Rules (deontic requirements)
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2 – Reviewing Representative must have executed a certificate
rule O reviewing_rep_must_have_certificate:
    reviewing_rep.has_executed_certificate always

@ Clause 2 – Representative may not use Confidential Information for competitive advantage
rule F reviewing_rep_use_competitive_advantage:
    reviewing_rep.used_confidential_for_competitive_advantage = false always

@ Clause 2 – When employment ends, access must be terminated
rule O terminate_access_on_employment_end:
    (not reviewing_rep.is_employed) implies (reviewing_rep.has_access = false) always

@ Clause 5 – No disclosure to third parties without written approval
rule F disclose_to_third_party_without_approval:
    -- Modelled by a Boolean field on the disclosing Party; the field must stay false
    disclosing_party.has_disclosed_agreement = false always

@ Hypothesis – Receiving Party shall not disclose the fact that the Agreement was
--            agreed or negotiated.
rule O receiving_party_not_disclose_agreement_fact:
    receiving_party.has_disclosed_agreement = false always

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Helper Functions (optional, for readability)
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
func is_disclosing(p: Party) -> bool:
    p = disclosing_party

func is_receiving(p: Party) -> bool:
    p = receiving_party

-- End of module
```
